name: createTable
description: Creates a new named table with specific column types. Tables provide structured data with typed columns, automatic formatting, and special features like dropdown validation.

spreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Sheets URL.

name.description: Unique name for the table within this spreadsheet. Table names must be unique.

range.description: A1 notation range for the table (e.g., "Sheet1!A1:E10"). Must be within existing sheet boundaries.

columnName.description: Display name for the column header.

columnType.description: Data type for the column (default: TEXT).

dropdownValues.description: Required for DROPDOWN type: list of dropdown options.

columns.description: Column definitions. If not specified, columns are auto-detected from first row.

hasHeaderRow.description: Whether the table has a header row (default: true).

hasFooterRow.description: Whether the table should have a footer row (default: false).
